{{Quote|You hang on. You might feel a bit sleepy.|[[Etain Tur-Mukan]] comforting Fi in his last moments|<ref name="Republic Commando: Triple Zero" />}}
'''Fi''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who served in the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps's]] [[Sarlacc Battalions]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], [[Gender/Legends|he]] fought in a [[Skirmish at Dinlo|skirmish]] on [[Dinlo]] until he was mortally wounded during the firefight. Before his [[Death/Legends|death]], Fi was comforted by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] while aboard a modified [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/carrier/Legends|LAAT/c]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]]. Fi shortly succumbed from his wounds and died. Fi's death hit Etain hard because he had the same name as [[Fi Skirata|Fi]] the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]], [[Squad/Legends|squadmate]] of Etain's lover, [[Darman Skirata|Darman]].<ref name="Republic Commando: Triple Zero" />
